characters.name: Andrew
characters.description: AndrewNameAndrewGenderMaleFriendsBurt ChanceRomanceDonna(ex-wife)ProductionFirst Appearance"Baby Monitor"Last Appearance"Making the Band"Episode Count5Portrayed byEthan SupleeAndrewis the ex-husband ofDonna, friend ofBurt Chanceand a recurring character inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Ethan Suplee. In his first appearance in "Baby Monitor", we get a peak into his relationship with his then-wifeDonna. The relationship seems somewhat tumultuous, and Donna yells at him often. She eventually leaves him, but it turns out that Andrew was more attached to her than he let on, and as a result he clings to his relationship with his only other friend,Burt Chance. Andrew is Burt's best friend, and the two become business partners when they invent Bro-gurt together ("Bro-gurt").

characters.name: Arnold
characters.description: ArnoldNameArnoldGenderMaleAgeApproximately 60OccupationUnknownFamilyVirginia Chance(daughter)Burt Chance(son-in-law)Jimmy Chance(grandson)Hope Chance(great-granddaughter)Sabrina Collins(granddaughter-in-law)RomanceLouise Thompson(one night stand)ProductionFirst Appearance"Déjà Vu Man"Last Appearance"The Father Daughter Dance"Episode Count2Portrayed byJeffrey TamborArnoldis the father ofVirginia Chance, father-in-law ofBurt Chance, grandfather ofJimmy Chance, grandfather-in-law ofSabrina Collins-Chanceand great grandfather ofHope Chanceand a minor character inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Jeffrey Tambor. Arnold first appears in "Déjà Vu Man", when we learn he has been stalking the Chance family for many years and has a collection of pictures of them he has taken throughout their lives.VirginiaandBurtobviously find this a bit creepy, and set out to find his identity. They eventually learn fromMaw Mawthat he is Virginia's father, and when Virginia confronts him, he admits that he is in fact her father and didn't want to abandon her whenLouisedid, but he was driven out of town because of the fact that he's gay. Virginia accepts this, and the two briefly become close, until she learns from Maw Maw that the reason that Maw Maw hates him is not because he's gay, but because he skipped out on his responsibility with Virginia.Barneyalso adds that he was raised by twolesbian mothersin Natesville around the same time, suggesting Arnold probably was not run out of town, but didn't want to take on being a father.

characters.name: Barbara June Thompson
characters.description: Barbara June ThompsonNameBarbara June Mayfair-ThompsonGenderFemaleDate of BirthSeptember 19th, 1926Age85-86FamilyNorma June Mayfair† (mother)Wilfred Thompson† (husband)Unnamed SonLouise Thompson(daughter)Virginia Chance(granddaughter)Delilah Thompson(granddaughter)Burt Chance(grandson-in-law)Jimmy Chance(great-grandson)Hope Chance(great-great-granddaughter)Sabrina Collins-Chance(great-granddaughter-in-law)RomanceWilfred Thompson† (husband)Mel (ex-boyfriend)Hubert (ex-boyfriend)ProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"The Father Daughter Dance"Episode Count83Portrayed byCloris LeachmanBarbara June Thompson(néeMayfair), usually referred to by her family as simply "Maw Maw", isLouise Thompson's mother,Virginia's grandmother,Jimmy's great-grandmother,Hope's great-great-grandmother andBurt's grandmother-in-law and one of the main characters inRaising Hope. She is portrayed byCloris Leachman. Barbara June was born on September 19th, 1926. She marriedWilfred Thompsonand had 2 children, one of them being Virginia's mother,Louise. Louise became pregnant at a young age withVirginia, and soon abandoned her. After Louise left, Maw Maw and Paw Paw were left to raise Virginia themselves. When Maw Maw's granddaughter Virginia was fifteen, she was impregnated byBurt Chanceand had a son, Jimmy. In a flashback in the episode "Say Cheese", Maw Maw tells a young Jimmy to kill her if she ever becomes as crazy as Burt and Virginia, suggesting that she was probably lucid when Jimmy was a child.

She is portrayed byCloris Leachman. Barbara June was born on September 19th, 1926. She marriedWilfred Thompsonand had 2 children, one of them being Virginia's mother,Louise. Louise became pregnant at a young age withVirginia, and soon abandoned her. After Louise left, Maw Maw and Paw Paw were left to raise Virginia themselves. When Maw Maw's granddaughter Virginia was fifteen, she was impregnated byBurt Chanceand had a son, Jimmy. In a flashback in the episode "Say Cheese", Maw Maw tells a young Jimmy to kill her if she ever becomes as crazy as Burt and Virginia, suggesting that she was probably lucid when Jimmy was a child.

characters.name: Barney Hughes
characters.description: Barney HughesNameBarney HughesGenderMaleAge40sOccupationManager of Howdy's MarketFamilyTwo Unnamed MothersUnnamed Identical Twin BrotherBarney Jr. (Son)FriendsJimmy ChanceSabrina Collins-ChanceRomanceJudy(ex-wife)Maxine(ex-girlfriend)ProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"The Father Daughter Dance"Episode Count71Portrayed byGregg BinkleyBarney Hughesis the manager ofHowdy's Marketand one of the main characters inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Gregg Binkley. His store employees areJimmy,Sabrina, andFrank. He used to be very overweight but had a gastric bypass surgery ("Don't Vote for This Episode"). He has a large collection of dolls within his house, much to Jimmy and Sabrina's horror andBurt's amusement. He was raised by a lesbian couple, but they never appear in the series. He was previously married to a woman named Judy, but is now divorced from her. She has a son namedTrevorwith someone else, He also has been hinted to have a son named Barney Jr. He briefly dated a woman named Maxine, Sabrina's aunt.

characters.name: Big Judy
characters.actor_name: Karen Y. McClain(credited as Karen McClain)
characters.description: Big JudyNameJudith (likely)GenderFemaleProductionFirst Appearance"Gambling Again"Last Appearance"Lord of the Ring"Episode Count3Portrayed byKaren Y. McClain(credited as Karen McClain)Big Judyis the owner of the local pawnshap and a minor character inRaising Hope. She is portrayed by Karen Y. McClain. Judy is a diabetic, and is quite good at ventriloquism, being able to talk without moving her mouth and while drinking a beverage. Her full name is unknown, and she is always referred to as simply Big Judy.

He is portrayed by J.K. Simmons.

characters.name: Cap Collins
characters.description: Cap CollinsNameCap CollinsGenderMaleOccupationUnknownFamilySabrina Collins-Chance(daughter)Susan Collins (daughter)Shelley Collins(niece)Nana (ex-mother-in-law)Jimmy Chance(son-in-law)Hope Chance(step-granddaughter)RomanceTamara Jones(ex-wife)ProductionOnly Appearance"Sabrina Has Money"Episode Count1Portrayed byStephen RootCap Collinsis the father ofSabrina Collinsand Susan Collins, ex-husband ofTamara Jones, father-in-law ofJimmy Chanceand adoptive grandfather ofHope Chanceand a minor character inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Stephen Root. Cap is a very rich man, but unfortunately seems to be lacking in his skills as a father. Sabrina once mentioned that when she was 12, every time she'd get an answer correct while watchingJeopardy!, Cap would accuse her of sleeping with Alex Trebek. Cap's only appearance is in "Sabrina Has Money" after Sabrina is revealed to come from a rich family whenBurtcomes in to use the bathroom at Cap's mansion after doing lawn work.

characters.name: Christine Chance
characters.description: Christine ChanceNameChristine ChanceGenderFemaleAge60s-70s (likely)OccupationUnknownFamilyRalph Chance(third cousin)Bruce Chance(son)Burt Chance(son)Virginia Chance(daughter-in-law)Mike Chance(grandson)Jimmy Chance(grandson)Hope Chance(great-granddaughter)Sabrina Collins-Chance(granddaughter-in-law)RomanceRalph Chance(husband)ProductionFirst Appearance"Burt's Parents"Last Appearance"Hot Dish"Episode Count3Portrayed byShirley JonesChristine Chanceis the wife (and third cousin) ofRalph Chance, mother ofBruce ChanceandBurt Chance, mother-in-law ofVirginia Chance, grandmother ofMike ChanceandJimmy Chance, great-grandmother ofHope Chanceand grandmother-in-law ofSabrina Collins-Chanceand a minor character inRaising Hope. characters.name: Dale Carlyle
characters.description: Dale CarlyleNameDale CarlyleGenderMaleOccupationPsychiatristFamilyLucy Carlyle(daughter)Hope Chance(biological granddaughter)RomanceMargine Carlyle(wife)ProductionFirst Appearance"Meet the Grandparents"Last Appearance"Modern Wedding"Episode Count3Portrayed byGreg GermannDale Carlyleis the father ofLucy Carlyle, husband ofMargine Carlyleand biological grandfather ofHope Chanceand a recurring character inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Greg Germann. Dale is a psychiatrist and methis wifewhen he was treating her (and continued treating her after the two married). After their daughter,Lucy, was executed for her murders, his wife went into a catatonic state and he has been treating her since. In "Meet the Grandparents",Jimmydecides it's high time to meet Hope's grandparents and decides to invite them to Thanksgiving DInner. Dale is hesitant because of his wife's current condition, but they eventually agree to come anyway. At dinner, things seem to be going fine until they kidnap Hope. The Chances are willing to let it go if they return Hope, except forVirginia, who takes out Margine and then Dale with a computer monitor (which seems to have become her trademark--taking people out with home electronics) and soon calls the police. They are then sentenced to five to ten years in prison.

characters.name: Dancin' Dan
characters.description: Dancin' DanNameDanGenderMaleAge30s (likely)ProductionFirst Appearance"Blue Dots"Last Appearance"The Father Daughter Dance"Episode Count18Portrayed byDan CoscinoDancin' Dan(formerly known as Joggin' Dan) is a homeless man who likes dancing and a recurring character inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Dan Coscino. We don't know a whole lot about Dan or how he became homeless, but we do know he's some type of cousin to the Chance family as insinuated in "Dead Tooth".

characters.name: Delilah Thompson
characters.description: Delilah ThompsonNameDelilah ThompsonGenderFemaleAge40sFamilyNorma June Mayfair† (great grandmother)Wilfred Thompson† (grandfather)Barbara June Thompson(grandmother)Unnamed FatherLouise Thompson(aunt)Virginia Chance(first cousin)Burt Chance(cousin-in-law)Jimmy Chance(first cousin once removed)Hope Chance(first cousin twice removed)RomanceUnnamed Ex-HusbandBurt Chance(ex-boyfriend)ProductionFirst Appearance"What Up, Cuz?"Last Appearance"Hey There, Delilah"Episode Count3Portrayed byAmy SedarisDelilah Thompsonis the cousin ofVirginia Chanceand granddaughter ofBarbara June ThompsonandWilfred Thompsonand a minor character inRaising Hope. She is portrayed by Amy Sedaris. It's not revealed exactly how Delilah and Virginia are related; all we know for sure is that they're cousins and both Maw Maw's grandchildren. Given the fact that her last name is Thompson, we can assume she's the daughter ofMaw Maw's son. Delilah first appears in "What Up, Cuz?" when she returns after 15 years and wants her share of Maw Maw's estate (whom she believes to be dead because of a lie Virginia told) and says her business was wiped out by the financial crisis.

characters.name: Frank Marolla
characters.description: Frank MarollaNameFrank MarollaGenderMaleDate of Birth1984-85Age26-30OccupationEmployee of Howdy's MarketFamilyUnnamed ParentsFriendsJimmy ChanceSabrina Collins-ChanceRomanceJimmy Chance(ex-husband)ProductionFirst Appearance"The Sniffles"Last Appearance"The Father Daughter Dance"Episode Count50Portrayed byTodd GiebenhainFrank Marollais an employee atHowdy's Marketand a recurring character inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Todd Giebenhain. Frank is a creepy and incompetent co-worker ofJimmyandSabrina'satHowdy's Market. In his homemade commercial for the store, he states that he was born in the Year of the Rat. It is surmised that he is referring to the Chinese Zodiac, and from his estimated age, was born between February 1984 and February 1985. He is also shown to have a gambling addiction. Frank lives alone in his parents' old house. In season 2's "The Men of New Natesville," it is hinted that Frank's parents abandoned him, and moved to Florida. The circumstances are not revealed; however Frank does reveal to Jimmy that his father is an alcoholic. Frank drives an AMC Pacer.

characters.name: Hope Chance
characters.actor_name: Baylie CregutRylie CregutMolly Morgan Lamont(age 13)Jessica Stieglitz (adult)
characters.description: Hope ChanceNameHope ChancePrincess Beyoncé Carlyle(birth name)GenderFemaleDate of BirthFebruary-March 2009Age6 months-4 yearsFamilyNorma June Mayfair† (paternal great-great-great-grandmother)Barbara June Thompson(paternal great-great-grandmother)Wilfred Thompson† (paternal great-great-grandfather)Louise Thompson(paternal great-grandmother)Arnold(paternal great-grandfather)Ralph Chance(paternal great-grandfather)Christine Chance(paternal great-grandmother)Maw Maw's Unnamed Son(paternal great-granduncle)Virginia Chance(paternal grandmother)Burt Chance(paternal grandfather)Bruce Chance(paternal granduncle)Mike Chance(first cousin, once removed)Dale Carlyle(maternal grandfather)Margine Carlyle(maternal grandmother)Cap Collins(step-grandfather/adoptive grandfather)Tamara Jones(step-grandmother/adoptive grandmother)Roberto (step-grandfather/adoptive step grandfather)Susan Collins(step-aunt/adoptive aunt)Madison (step-cousin/adoptive cousin)Unnamed step-aunt/adoptive step-auntNana (step-great-grandmother/adoptive great-grandmother)Shelley Collins(step first cousin, once removed/adoptive first cousin, once removed)Jimmy Chance(father)Lucy Carlyle(mother)Sabrina Collins-Chance(step-mother/adoptive mother)ProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"The Father Daughter Dance"Episode Count88Portrayed byBaylie CregutRylie CregutMolly Morgan Lamont(age 13)Jessica Stieglitz (adult)Hope Chanceis the daughter ofJimmy Chanceand serial killerLucy Carlyle, the adoptive daughter ofSabrina Collins, the granddaughter ofBurtandVirginia Chanceand the great-great-granddaughter ofBarbara June Thompsonand one of the main characters inRaising Hope. She is portrayed by twinsBaylie CregutandRylie Cregut. Hope was born toLucy CarlyleandJimmy Chancearound February-March 2010 and was originally named Princess Beyoncé while her mother was in prison for killing her previous boyfriends. After the death of her mother she was given to Jimmy. When she was 6 months old, her mother was executed and custody was given to her father, Jimmy Chance.

characters.description: Hope ChanceNameHope ChancePrincess Beyoncé Carlyle(birth name)GenderFemaleDate of BirthFebruary-March 2009Age6 months-4 yearsFamilyNorma June Mayfair† (paternal great-great-great-grandmother)Barbara June Thompson(paternal great-great-grandmother)Wilfred Thompson† (paternal great-great-grandfather)Louise Thompson(paternal great-grandmother)Arnold(paternal great-grandfather)Ralph Chance(paternal great-grandfather)Christine Chance(paternal great-grandmother)Maw Maw's Unnamed Son(paternal great-granduncle)Virginia Chance(paternal grandmother)Burt Chance(paternal grandfather)Bruce Chance(paternal granduncle)Mike Chance(first cousin, once removed)Dale Carlyle(maternal grandfather)Margine Carlyle(maternal grandmother)Cap Collins(step-grandfather/adoptive grandfather)Tamara Jones(step-grandmother/adoptive grandmother)Roberto (step-grandfather/adoptive step grandfather)Susan Collins(step-aunt/adoptive aunt)Madison (step-cousin/adoptive cousin)Unnamed step-aunt/adoptive step-auntNana (step-great-grandmother/adoptive great-grandmother)Shelley Collins(step first cousin, once removed/adoptive first cousin, once removed)Jimmy Chance(father)Lucy Carlyle(mother)Sabrina Collins-Chance(step-mother/adoptive mother)ProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"The Father Daughter Dance"Episode Count88Portrayed byBaylie CregutRylie CregutMolly Morgan Lamont(age 13)Jessica Stieglitz (adult)Hope Chanceis the daughter ofJimmy Chanceand serial killerLucy Carlyle, the adoptive daughter ofSabrina Collins, the granddaughter ofBurtandVirginia Chanceand the great-great-granddaughter ofBarbara June Thompsonand one of the main characters inRaising Hope. She is portrayed by twinsBaylie CregutandRylie Cregut. Hope was born toLucy CarlyleandJimmy Chancearound February-March 2010 and was originally named Princess Beyoncé while her mother was in prison for killing her previous boyfriends. After the death of her mother she was given to Jimmy. When she was 6 months old, her mother was executed and custody was given to her father, Jimmy Chance.

characters.name: Jack
characters.description: JackNameJackGenderMaleProductionFirst Appearance"Kidnapped"Last Appearance"I Want My Baby Back, Baby Back, Baby Back"Episode Count2Portrayed bySean BridgersJackis a minor character inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Sean Bridgers. Jack first appears in "Kidnapped", when we find out he supposedly kidnappedBurt ChancewhenJimmywas a child. He appears again in "I Want My Baby Back, Baby Back, Baby Back" when he testifies as a character witness forLucy'seffort to gain custody ofHope.

characters.name: Javier
characters.description: JavierNameJavierGenderMaleFriendsJimmy ChanceMarcusProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Don't Vote for This Episode"Episode Count5Portrayed byRay SantiagoJavieris one of the best friends ofJimmy Chanceand a recurring character inSeason 1ofRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Ray Santiago. Along withMarcus, Javier only appears in season one, when he keeps trying to get Jimmy to do dangerous things despite his status as a new father.

characters.name: Jimmy Chance
characters.description: Jimmy ChanceNameJames Bon Jovi ChanceGenderMaleDate of BirthSeptember 19, 1988Age23-26OccupationGrocery baggerFamilyNorma June Mayfair† (maternal great-great-grandmother)Wilfred Thompson† (maternal great-grandfather)Barbara June Thompson(maternal great-grandmother)Louise Thompson(maternal grandmother)Arnold(maternal grandfather)Maw Maw's Unnamed Son(maternal great-uncle)Delilah Thompson(maternal first cousin, once removed)Ralph Chance(paternal grandfather)Christine Chance(paternal grandmother)Burt Chance(father)Virginia Chance(mother)Bruce Chance(paternal uncle)Mike Chance(paternal first cousin)Hope Chance(daughter)Cap Collins(father-in-law)Tamara Jones(mother-in-law)Roberto (step-father-in-law)Susan Collins(sister-in-law)Madison (niece)Unnamed step-sister-in-lawNana (grandmother-in-law)Shelley Collins(cousin-in-law)FriendsJavierMarcusBarney HughesShelley CollinsFrank MarollaRomanceRachel (ex-girlfriend)Lucy Carlyle(ex-wife)Zoe (dated)Mary-Louise(fake girlfriend)Frank Marolla(ex-husband)Sabrina Collins-Chance(wife)ProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"The Father Daughter Dance"Episode Count88Portrayed byLucas NeffGreyson Chance(age 13)Mason Cook(age 8)Trace Garcia(age 3/4/5)James Bon Jovi "Jimmy" Chanceis the son ofBurtandVirginia Chance, father ofHope Chance, husband ofSabrina Collinsand great-grandson ofBarbara June Thompsonand one of the main characters inRaising Hope. He is portrayed byLucas Neff. Jimmy was born on September 19, 1988 to teenage parentsBurtandVirginia Chance. He was believed to have been the result of an accidental pregnancy, but Burt later admitted to poking a hole in one of his condoms because he was afraid that Virginia would eventually leave him. While still an infant, Jimmy was given up for adoption to a seemingly perfect family, but only lived with them for three weeks before Burt and Virginia changed their minds. Jimmy is generally a good-natured (albeit a bit naive) and caring young man but is far from the sharpest tool in the shed. He frequently makes malapropisms, has horrible spelling and grammar, and often takes a while to make logical steps. Jimmy was born on September 19, 1988 to teenage parentsBurtandVirginia Chance. characters.personality_section: Jimmy was born on September 19, 1988 to teenage parentsBurtandVirginia Chance. He was believed to have been the result of an accidental pregnancy, but Burt later admitted to poking a hole in one of his condoms because he was afraid that Virginia would eventually leave him. While still an infant, Jimmy was given up for adoption to a seemingly perfect family, but only lived with them for three weeks before Burt and Virginia changed their minds. Jimmy is generally a good-natured (albeit a bit naive) and caring young man but is far from the sharpest tool in the shed. He frequently makes malapropisms, has horrible spelling and grammar, and often takes a while to make logical steps. He lives with his wife,Sabrina, and his daughter,Hope. Their economic status would be considered lower class (likely under the poverty level), as the family struggles financially to keep up with things like working household appliances, health insurance, and house maintenance. Jimmy's parents meant well, but were very young when they raised him. This led them to employ unorthodox parenting practices such as poor hygiene (as in dropping food/kitchen utensils/pacifiers on the floor and continuing to use them) and continual lies to Jimmy throughout childhood and into his adulthood, to either keep him out of trouble or just to make him easier to handle. Such lies include that he's allergic toallfruit, an eel lives in his butt and will bite his hand off if he picks at his butt, and that the "internet tubes"

characters.name: Justin
characters.description: JustinNameJustinGenderMaleDate of Birth1980s (likely)FamilyDonovan(father)Sylvia(mother)Unnamed SonRomanceSabrina Collins(crush)ProductionOnly Appearance"Romeo and Romeo"Episode Count1Portrayed byBrandon T. JacksonJustinis the son ofDonovanandSylvia, father of an unnamed son and a minor character inRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Brandon T. Jackson. Justin is a single father whomJimmymeets atHowdy's Marketand hopes to become friends with. Unfortunately, things don't work out after Justin reveals he likesSabrinaand asks her out under the guise of seeing how easily she'll dump her boyfriendWyatt, promising that if she says yes, Jimmy will have dibs. She declines, but Jimmy finds out Justin has asked her to a movie as "friends" in an attempt to make it something more. Jimmy obviously doesn't react well to this, and the two end up in a physical altercation. However, despite he and Jimmy's friendship not working out, his fatherDonovanand motherSylviahit it off withBurtandVirginia.

characters.name: Louise Thompson
characters.description: Louise ThompsonNameLouise ThompsonGenderFemaleDate of Birth1951 (likely)AgeApproximately 60FamilyNorma June Mayfair† (grandmother)Wilfred Thompson† (father)Barbara June Thompson(mother)Unnamed BrotherVirginia Chance(daughter)Burt Chance(son-in-law)Delilah Thompson(niece)Jimmy Chance(grandson)Hope Chance(great-granddaughter)Sabrina Collins-Chance(granddaughter-in-law)RomanceArnold(one night stand)ProductionOnly Appearance"Family Secrets"Episode Count1Portrayed byLinda GehringerAlisa Hensley (age 20)Louise Thompsonis the daughter ofBarbara JuneandWilfred Thompson, mother ofVirginia, grandmother ofJimmy, great-grandmother ofHopeand a minor character inRaising Hope. She is portrayed by Linda Gehringer. Louise had Virginia at the age of 20 and, feeling that mothering was not for her, wanted to give her up for adoption, but Maw Maw wouldn't hear of it. As a result, Maw Maw took Virginia in and Louise left when Virginia was two and never came back, but told Maw Maw to make up a story about why she left so Virginia wouldn't try to find her when she got older. Virginia grew up believing that her mother had died after wearing a plastic bag on her face to keep bees off of her while trying to get honey from a beehive under the eave of the house, falling and hitting her head on a lawn duck. Virginia wanted to shield Jimmy from people thinking her mother was an idiot for dying the way she did, so she never told him about this until he pressed her on it in "Family Secrets".

She is portrayed by Linda Gehringer. Louise had Virginia at the age of 20 and, feeling that mothering was not for her, wanted to give her up for adoption, but Maw Maw wouldn't hear of it. As a result, Maw Maw took Virginia in and Louise left when Virginia was two and never came back, but told Maw Maw to make up a story about why she left so Virginia wouldn't try to find her when she got older. Virginia grew up believing that her mother had died after wearing a plastic bag on her face to keep bees off of her while trying to get honey from a beehive under the eave of the house, falling and hitting her head on a lawn duck. Virginia wanted to shield Jimmy from people thinking her mother was an idiot for dying the way she did, so she never told him about this until he pressed her on it in "Family Secrets".

characters.name: Lucy Carlyle
characters.description: Lucy CarlyleNameLucy CarlyleGenderFemaleDate of BirthMay 12Age20sOccupationSerial KillerFamilyDale Carlyle(father)Margine Carlyle(mother)Hope Chance(daughter)RomanceJimmy Chance(ex-husband)Several Unnamed Ex-Boyfriends (deceased)ProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Modern Wedding"Episode Count7Portrayed byBijou PhillipsLucy Carlyeis the serial killer mother ofHope Chanceand the daughter ofDaleandMargine Carlyleand a minor character inRaising Hope. She is portrayed by Bijou Phillips. Lucy was born to Dale and Margine Carlyle on May 12th of an unknown year. Her father is a psychiatrist and met her mother Margine while treating her for depression. Lucy is a serial killer who murders her boyfriends and then changes her name to avoid getting caught. She meets Jimmy while running from a boyfriend she tried to kill. Lucy's original boyfriend forgets her birthday, and she tries to strangle him with shoelaces. As Lucy flees the scene, she notices Jimmy in his van on his way to buyMaw-Mawsome bubble-gum ice cream. She calls out to Jimmy for help and Jimmy (believing her boyfriend was about to murder her) lets her jump into the van before racing back to his house. Once the pair arrive at Jimmy's place, Lucy flatters Jimmy, calling him her hero and telling him he's cute before seducing him and they have sex in the back of the van. The next morning, Jimmy wakes up in the van.

characters.name: Marcus
characters.description: MarcusNameMarcusGenderMaleFriendsJimmy ChanceJavierProductionFirst Appearance"Dead Tooth"Last Appearance"Don't Vote for This Episode"Episode Count5Portrayed byJermaine WilliamsMarcusis one of the best friends ofJimmy Chanceand a recurring character inSeason 1ofRaising Hope. He is portrayed by Jermaine Williams. Marcus was a close friend of Jimmy's. He enjoyed using the word 'macabre' and blowing things up. Along withJavier, he disappeared without explanation after the first season.

characters.name: Margine Carlyle
characters.description: Margine CarlyleNameMargine CarlyleGenderFemaleAgeUnknownFamilyLucy Carlyle(daughter)Hope Chance(biological granddaughter)RomanceDale Carlyle(husband)ProductionOnly Appearance"Meet the Grandparents"Episode Count1Portrayed byValerie MahaffeyMargine Carlyleis the mother ofLucy Carlyle, wife ofDale Carlyleand a minor character inRaising Hope. She is portrayed by Valerie Mahaffey. WhenJimmyinvites Margine and Dale over for dinner in "Meet the Grandparents", they become attached to Hope...so much so that they kidnap her, and ultimately go to prison. We learn in "Killer Hope" that Dale was able to get out early for good behavior, but Margine stabbed a guard and now has to serve 12 more years.

characters.name: Maw Maw's Unnamed Son
characters.description: Maw Maw's Unnamed SonName(Name Unknown) ThompsonGenderMaleDate of Birth1940s-1950s (likely)Age60s-70sFamilyNorma June Mayfair† (grandmother)Wilfred Thompson† (father)Barbara June Thompson(mother)Louise Thompson(sister)Virginia Chance(niece)Burt Chance(nephew-in-law)Delilah Thompson(daughter)Jimmy Chance(grandnephew)Hope Chance(great-grandniece)Sabrina Collins-Chance(grandniece-in-law)ProductionFirst AppearanceN/AEpisode Count0Portrayed byN/AMaw Maw and Paw Paw's Unnamed Sonis the son ofBarbara June ThompsonandWilfred Thompsonand the father ofDelilah Thompsonand an unseen character inRaising Hope. He never appears in the series, but given that Delilah's last name is Thompson, and Maw Maw is her grandmother, Maw Maw likely has a son. Also, Maw Maw discretely hints about having a son throughout the series.
